docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, RAFAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
